document.title: SimTrade - Financial Simulation & Strategy Development Ecosystem

hero.title: SimTrade Ecosystem
hero.subtitle: A modular, open-source suite of financial simulation, strategy development, and machine learning tools for traders and developers.

overview.title: Ecosystem Overview
overview.subtitle: SimTrade ecosystem combines open-source core modules with a professional desktop edition, designed for modularity, clarity, and interoperability across projects.
overview.feature1Desc: Each component has clear functions and can be used independently or flexibly combined to meet different research and trading needs.
overview.feature2Desc: Fully open source core modules (SimTradeData, SimTradeLab, SimTradeML) supporting community contributions for continuous improvement and optimization.
overview.feature3Desc: SimTradeDesk provides a commercial-grade desktop application with enhanced features, no environment setup required, and seamless integration with the open-source core.

modules.title: Core Modules
modules.subtitle: The SimTrade ecosystem consists of four core modules, each focusing on different aspects of financial research and trading.

data.title: SimTradeData
data.desc: Provides clean, structured financial data, supporting historical data acquisition, processing, and storage. Serves as the data source for the entire ecosystem.

lab.title: SimTradeLab
lab.desc: A lightweight, event-driven strategy backtesting framework that uses raw data and model outputs to run strategy simulations with dynamic decision-making.

ml.title: SimTradeML
ml.desc: Machine learning engine for financial prediction and strategy integration, training prediction models from SimTradeData to support trading decisions.
ml.feature1: Support for multiple machine learning algorithms
ml.feature2: Model training, evaluation, and deployment pipeline

desk.title: SimTradeDesk
desk.desc: The dedicated desktop edition of SimTradeLab, providing a fast, secure, and fully local environment for strategy development, backtesting, simulation, and broker-side deployment. No Python, no environment setup - just download, install, and start building strategies.
desk.feature2: Strategy editor with autocompletion and syntax highlighting

workflow.title: Workflow
workflow.subtitle: How the modules of the SimTrade ecosystem work together to form a complete financial simulation and strategy development pipeline.

complete.title: Complete Workflow
complete.description: Strategies written in SimTradeLab can choose to call SimTradeML models to generate trading signals, forming a full-stack simulation pipeline from data ingestion to strategy execution.

flexible.title: Flexible Integration
flexible.description: While the three modules are designed to work together, each module can run independently to meet specific needs, such as only using SimTradeData for data acquisition.

iterative.title: Iterative Optimization
iterative.description: The workflow supports continuous iteration and optimization. Backtest results can feed back into model training, improving model performance and strategy effectiveness.

features.title: Core Features
features.subtitle: Key advantages and capabilities of the SimTrade ecosystem providing comprehensive support for financial research and trading.
features.description: Key advantages and distinctive capabilities of the SimTrade ecosystem, providing comprehensive support for financial research and trading.

data.title: Data-Driven
data.description: Built on high-quality financial data, supporting multi-source data integration and standardized processing to provide reliable decision-making basis.

quant.title: Quantitative Analysis
quant.description: Offering comprehensive quantitative analysis tools that support technical indicator calculation, risk assessment and performance measurement.

automated.title: Automated Trading
automated.description: Supporting strategy automated execution, reducing human intervention and improving trading efficiency and consistency.

predictive.title: Intelligent Prediction
predictive.description: Integrates advanced machine learning algorithms to provide market prediction and pattern recognition capabilities to assist decision-making.

flexible.title: Flexible Extension
flexible.description: Open API design supporting custom function development and third-party tool integration to meet diverse needs.

community.title: Community-Driven
community.description: Active open-source community continuously improving and extending features, sharing best practices and strategies.

risk.title: Risk Management
risk.description: Comprehensive risk management tools supporting risk assessment, backtesting, and monitoring to protect portfolio safety.

visual.title: Visual Analysis
visual.description: Intuitive data visualization tools to help understand market trends, strategy performance, and risk conditions.

cta.title: Start Your Quantitative Trading Journey
cta.subtitle: Join the SimTrade community and explore modular, open-source financial simulation and strategy development tools.
cta.description: Join the SimTrade community, explore modular, open-source financial simulation and strategy development tools to enhance your trading efficiency and decision quality.
